cards.title: Amazon Uses AI to Generate Product Images
cards.body: Amazon will use visual search and AI to show AI-generated product images matching search queries. The retailer says this will help guide users to products.

cards.title: Voice AI Startup Scales Across Africa, Middle East
cards.body: Founders from Goldman and Meta built a voice AI stack serving overlooked markets. The startup now handles over 17,000 calls per day.

cards.title: Publishers Can Now Opt Out of AI Search
cards.body: U.K. regulators are requiring Google offer a tool for publishers to opt-out of generative AI search features. The option will be tested in the U.K. then rolled out globally.

cards.title: Meta's WhatsApp AI Agent Goes Global
cards.body: Meta's AI agent for WhatsApp Business is now available globally. WhatsApp will charge businesses based on token usage.

cards.title: Coralogix Raises $200M for AI Monitoring
cards.body: Coralogix is betting on demand for tools to monitor AI agent behavior in production. The infrastructure firm is among growing players providing operational oversight for AI systems.

cards.title: Cyera Eyes $12B Valuation Despite Losses
cards.body: The cybersecurity company is nearing a $300 million funding round led by Evolution Equity Partners. Cyera is valued at 80x ARR multiple.

cards.title: Uber Caps AI Spending After Budget Overrun
cards.body: Uber has capped employee AI spending after blowing through its budget in just 4 months. The cutback follows the company's push to encourage staff AI usage.

cards.title: Microsoft Releases AI Testing Framework
cards.body: Microsoft released Adaptive Spec-driven Scoring for Evaluation and Regression Testing, an open source framework. Developers can now spin up AI evaluations using text descriptions.

cards.title: Scorsese Uses AI for Film Storyboarding
cards.body: Martin Scorsese has become an unlikely Hollywood voice for AI adoption. The legendary director is using the technology solely for storyboarding purposes.

cards.title: Microsoft Launches Scout Personal Assistant
cards.body: Microsoft Scout is a new AI assistant launched at Build. It brings OpenClaw-inspired power and flexibility into the Microsoft 365 system.

cards.title: Google Rolls Out Deepfake Call Detection
cards.body: Google is deploying fake call detection to protect against AI deepfake impersonation scams. Scammers are increasingly spoofing trusted numbers and using AI voices.

cards.title: Microsoft Helps Devs Control AI Agent Behavior
cards.body: Microsoft is offering developers better ways to control AI agent behavior through portable policy files. Compliance and security teams can define custom policies for agents.

cards.title: Amazon Faces Lawsuit Over Ring Facial Recognition
cards.body: A class action lawsuit claims Amazon's Ring Familiar Faces stores images without consent. The suit was filed by a Virginia resident in Seattle.

cards.title: Trump Signs Narrower AI Oversight Executive Order
cards.body: President Trump signed a revised AI executive order after industry objections. The order now requires only voluntary prerelease government reviews of advanced models.

cards.title: OpenAI Launches Codex Tools for White-Collar Work
cards.body: OpenAI released six plug-ins for specific jobs: data analytics, creative production, sales, product design, equity investing, and investment banking. Tools are available within the Codex app.

cards.title: Anthropic Expands Claude to Critical Infrastructure
cards.body: Anthropic is expanding Project Glasswing to 150 organizations across 15+ countries. Claude Mythos access targets critical infrastructure in power, water, healthcare, and communications.

cards.title: ZeroDrift Raises $10M for AI Compliance
cards.body: ZeroDrift is building an AI compliance service between models and users. The service flags and replaces messages that present compliance problems.

cards.title: Impulse Space Raises $500M, Prioritizes Human Talent
cards.body: Rocket engine startup Impulse Space raised $500 million for hiring people, not AI. Engineering physical systems still depends on human talent, says the company.

cards.title: Alphabet Plans $80B Investment in AI Buildout
cards.body: Alphabet plans to raise $80 billion to fund its AI expansion. The company says demand for AI solutions is exceeding available supply.

cards.title: Nvidia Chases CPU Market with AI Agent PCs
cards.body: Nvidia is pursuing the $200B CPU market with AI agent PCs from Microsoft, Dell, and HP. The company aims to bring AI agents safely to consumers.

cards.title: Amazon Uses AI to Generate Product Images
cards.body: Amazon is deploying AI-generated product images in search results to help guide users to relevant items. The visual search feature leverages artificial intelligence to match queries with product recommendations.

cards.title: Founders Build Voice AI for Underserved Markets
cards.body: Two former Goldman Sachs and Meta executives launched a voice AI startup targeting Africa and the Middle East. Their custom stack now processes over 17,000 calls daily.

cards.title: U.K. Requires Google AI Search Opt-Out Tool
cards.body: New U.K. regulation mandates Google provide publishers an option to opt out of generative AI search features. The tool will be tested locally before global rollout.

cards.title: Meta's WhatsApp AI Agent Goes Global
cards.body: WhatsApp's AI agent for businesses is now available worldwide, charging companies based on token usage. The feature streamlines customer interactions through artificial intelligence.

cards.title: Coralogix Raises $200M for AI Agent Monitoring
cards.body: Coralogix leads a growing wave of startups building tools to monitor AI agents in production. The infrastructure company addresses rising demand for reliability and troubleshooting as AI systems scale.

cards.title: Uber Restricts Employee AI Spending After Overages
cards.body: Uber capped internal AI spending after employees burned through the budget in just four months. The company had previously encouraged staff to maximize AI tool usage.

cards.title: Microsoft Launches AI Behavior Testing Framework
cards.body: Microsoft released Adaptive Spec-driven Scoring for Evaluation and Regression Testing, an open-source tool for AI evaluations. Developers can now create AI behavior tests using simple text descriptions.

cards.title: Scorsese Uses AI for Film Storyboarding
cards.body: Martin Scorsese has become an unlikely AI advocate, using the technology exclusively for storyboarding. The legendary director's adoption signals mainstream acceptance of AI in creative workflows.

cards.title: Microsoft Launches Scout AI Assistant
cards.body: Microsoft Scout, unveiled at Build, brings OpenClaw-inspired capabilities into Microsoft 365. The personal AI assistant combines flexibility with enterprise integration.

cards.title: Google Adds AI Deepfake Call Detection
cards.body: Google is rolling out fake call detection to combat AI deepfake impersonation scams. The feature protects against spoofed numbers and AI-generated voices mimicking authority figures.

cards.title: Microsoft Lets Devs Control AI Agent Behavior
cards.body: Microsoft introduced portable policy files allowing developers to define AI agent constraints. Compliance and security teams can now enforce custom policies across deployments.

cards.title: Ring Faces Class Action Over Facial Recognition
cards.body: Amazon's Ring faces a lawsuit claiming its Familiar Faces feature stores passerby images without consent. The AI facial-recognition tool is at the center of privacy concerns.

cards.title: Trump Signs Revised AI Oversight Executive Order
cards.body: President Trump signed a narrower AI executive order requiring only voluntary government reviews of advanced models. The move followed industry objections to stricter original proposals.

cards.title: OpenAI Launches Codex Plugins for Work
cards.body: OpenAI released six specialized Codex plug-ins targeting data analytics, creative work, sales, design, and finance. Each tool bundles integrations and context for specific professional roles.

cards.title: Anthropic Expands Claude Security Program Globally
cards.body: Anthropic is scaling Project Glasswing to 150 organizations across 15 countries, focusing on critical infrastructure. The security vulnerability program protects power, water, healthcare, and communications sectors.

cards.title: ZeroDrift Raises $10M for AI Compliance
cards.body: ZeroDrift offers AI compliance services sitting between models and end users, flagging problematic messages. The startup protects organizations from AI-related compliance risks.

cards.title: Alphabet Plans $80B Investment for AI Infrastructure
cards.body: Alphabet is raising $80 billion to fund its AI buildout as enterprise and consumer demand surges. The company states demand exceeds available AI supply.

cards.title: Nvidia Targets $200B CPU Market with AI Agents
cards.body: Nvidia is partnering with Microsoft, Dell, and HP to bring AI agent PCs to mainstream users. The push could reshape personal computing if executed successfully.

cards.title: Pope's Encyclical Warns AI is Never Neutral
cards.body: Pope Leo XIV's new encyclical on AI emphasizes that 'technology is never neutral.' Magnifica Humanitas calls for courage and solidarity in addressing AI challenges.

cards.title: Small Businesses Leverage AI for Operations
cards.body: AI tools now help small businesses handle accounting, design, research, and product development. The democratization of AI makes advanced capabilities accessible to enterprises of all sizes.

cards.title: Agentic AI Transforms Global Healthcare
cards.body: Agentic AI systems address chronic healthcare underinvestment and staffing shortages worldwide. The technology promises to reduce fragmented access and improve care outcomes.

cards.title: Microsoft Plans RTX Spark Desktop for Developers
cards.body: Microsoft is building Linux tools and an RTX Spark desktop environment for Windows developers. The effort enhances support for AI development workflows.

cards.title: Microsoft Project Solara is Agent-Focused OS
cards.body: Project Solara is a new Android-based OS designed specifically for AI agents rather than traditional apps. The operating system reimagines how agents interact with systems.

cards.title: Android Detects Spoofed Calls and AI Scams
cards.body: Android phones will soon detect spoofed calls and impersonation scams using AI technology. The feature protects users from deepfake-based social engineering attacks.

cards.title: Mathematicians Warn of AI Industry Threats
cards.body: Mathematicians are raising alarms as AI encroaches on their profession's core work. The warning highlights concerns about AI's impact on intellectual disciplines.

cards.title: GitHub Copilot Users React to Pricing Changes
cards.body: GitHub Copilot's new usage-based pricing has sparked reactions from developers concerned about costs. The shift reflects how AI tool expenses are becoming significant for users.
